known_caveats: Council b-roll clips (jan7_dais.mp4, feb4_dais.mp4) have a faint dark border (~5% top/bottom) that persists even at zoom 1.88-1.95. This is a baked-in artifact of the source clips — the existing BendPolicyPulse renders show the same artifact at much larger magnitude (~25% top/bottom at their lower zoom 1.10-1.20). My render is cleaner than the predecessor but not byte-perfect. A durable fix would re-encode the source clips with ffmpeg crop+scale to remove the baked letterbox. Filed for a future maintenance pass.
